So he reached out to me the morning of and was like, hey, I know you have a small reservation for six people, but I actually am going to have 20 people showing up.
So I was able to call the restaurant and move us from just a regular reservation into a private room.
The only caveat there is that I did have to move it to a prefix menu because when you're going with that many people, the restaurant can't really handle anything beyond a prefix menu at that point.
So, yeah, just being able to just call up your people and just say, hey, you're going to get a lot of money out of this, even though it's last minute.
